prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第71名，近年排名从83→82→80→70→69→71，整体稳中有升；2025年声誉评价偏负面（就业数据引关注）；抖音热度排名第62（一般 ），未见明显投档断档记录；2026年声誉数据中云南大学未出现重大负面舆情；民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-，其中统计学与物理类招生专业（统计学、数学 类等）直接相关，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，与物理类招生专业匹配度高；本省2026年考生总 数451000人，物理类估算约313896人，较2025年减少约2.1%，竞争略有缓解；云南大学位于昆明，属西南地区，对安徽考生而言 属于跨省就读，地域偏好一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（-4.3%）与安徽省物理类考生 减少（约-2.1%）对冲，缩招幅度略大于考生减少幅度，竞争整体略加剧，但位次后移趋势已持续多年，预计2026年最低位次约34137名，区间33637–34637名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20432 → 26100 → 25496 → 31598 → 35237, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9700 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 35237; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 45, a reduction of 2 students (about -4.3%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, approximately 71st, with recent rankings from 83→82→80→70→69→71, showing a stable upward trend overall; the 2025 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (employment data attracted attention); Douyin popularity ranking 62nd (average), with no obvious record of admission cut-off breaks; in 2026 reputation data, Yunnan University had no major negative public opinion; Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, among which Statistics is directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Statistics, Mathematics, etc.), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended socially, with high alignment with Physics Category enrollment majors; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 451,000, with an estimated 313,896 in the Physics Category, a decrease of about 2.1% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, which for Anhui candidates means studying across provinces, with average regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-4.3%) and the decrease in Anhui Province Physics Category candidates (about -2.1%) offset each other, with the reduction in enrollment slightly larger than the decrease in candidates, overall competition slightly intensifies, but the backward trend in rankings has persisted for many years; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 34137, with a range of 33637–34637.

- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering, etc.)
- Administrative Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 33637–34637, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 33000), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 34500), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 safety net majors, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.
